texto: Medicines are unusual commodities. Important drugs can save the lives and protect the health of millions. Their consumption can bring huge benefits, by helping patients to avoid infection and preventing serious damage to the economies of families, nations and even humanity at large.
explicacao: Citação de Thomas Pogge sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Medicines are unusual commodities. Important drugs can save the lives and protect the health of m…” articula vida, humanity, important em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como important e bring.
